channel.title: Coderturtle
channel.description: Practical field notes, lab scars, and workshop patterns from a cranky, hands-on engineering shell.

item.title: Cogs, tilt, and a terminal that talks back to agents
item.description: The ecosystem got its own page shaped like actual gears, the workshop floor stopped being flat, and the site learned to describe itself in a format agents can parse instead of just humans.

item.title: The dark reset: rejecting the schematic pass
item.description: The retro-futurist blueprint pass got rejected outright: too subtle, wrong kind of futuristic, missed the point. Here's the honest log of the reset that followed.

item.title: Vibing with ChatGPT
item.description: From concept to turtle-powered Astro site: an impatient engineer, a chatty AI, and the art of vibe-coding.
